# Urban Churn — Full Site Content for AI

> Craft ice cream creamery in Central Pennsylvania — unique flavors, natural ingredients, nothing fake.

## About Urban Churn

Urban Churn is a super premium craft ice cream company rooted in family tradition with an urban twist. Based in Central Pennsylvania, we craft small-batch ice cream using 16% butterfat grass-fed local PA dairy with no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives. We are PA Preferred certified.

Our mission: We set the bar for craft ice cream. Every batch is handcrafted with intention, using culturally-inspired flavor combinations that push boundaries while honoring tradition.

### Key Facts
- **Founded in**: Central Pennsylvania
- **Locations**: 3 shops — Carlisle, Mechanicsburg, Harrisburg, PA
- **Phone**: 717-884-9396
- **Email**: contact@urbanchurn.com
- **Website**: https://urbanchurn.com
- **Social**: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter (@urbanchurn)
- **Certifications**: PA Preferred

## Locations

### Urban Churn — Carlisle
- Address: 45 W High St, Carlisle, PA 17013
- Phone: 717-884-9396
- Type: Retail shop

### Urban Churn — Mechanicsburg
- Location: Mechanicsburg, PA
- Phone: 717-884-9396
- Type: Retail shop

### Urban Churn — Harrisburg
- Location: Harrisburg, PA
- Phone: 717-884-9396
- Type: Retail shop

## Products

### Ice Cream
Urban Churn offers craft ice cream in pint and other sizes, available for pre-order online with pickup at any location. Our flavors rotate seasonally and feature unique, culturally-inspired creations.

**Product Characteristics:**
- 16% butterfat (super premium classification)
- Local PA grass-fed dairy
- No artificial colors or flavors
- Small batch production
- Rotating seasonal flavors

**How Pre-Order Works:**
1. Browse available flavors at urbanchurn.com/pre-order
2. Select your size and quantity
3. Choose your pickup location
4. Pick up at your convenience during store hours

### Custom Cakes
We create custom ice cream cakes and baked cakes:
- **Sizes**: 6-inch, 7-inch, 8-inch
- **Types**: Pre-stacked designs and fully customizable cakes
- **Price Range**: $75 – $125
- **Ingredients**: Same natural, no-artificial philosophy as our ice cream
- **Order**: urbanchurn.com/bakery

## Services

### Catering
Craft ice cream catering for any event in Central Pennsylvania:
- Weddings
- Corporate events
- School functions
- Private parties
- Custom flavor selection available
- Equipment rental included
- Book at: urbanchurn.com/catering

### Wholesale (B2B)
Partner with Urban Churn for wholesale craft ice cream:
- Scoop service for restaurants and bars
- Branded retail pints for shops
- PA Preferred certified
- Super premium quality
- Inquire at: urbanchurn.com/wholesale

### Fundraising Programs
We offer two fundraising programs for schools and nonprofits:

**Pints for Purpose** (Schools):
- 35% profit margin
- No upfront costs
- Marketing materials included
- Pre-packaged pint sales

**Scoop for Funds** (Nonprofits):
- 30% profit margin
- No upfront costs
- Marketing materials included
- Apply at: urbanchurn.com/fundraising

## Events
Urban Churn hosts regular events including:
- **Tastings**: Ice cream tasting experiences
- **Festivals**: Ice cream festivals and community events
- **Pop-Ups**: Limited-time pop-up locations
- **Trivia**: Trivia nights at our shops
- **Parties**: Private event hosting

Browse events and purchase tickets: urbanchurn.com/events

## Careers
We hire for positions across all locations:
- Part-time, full-time, and seasonal roles
- Locations: Carlisle, Mechanicsburg, Harrisburg (retail), Rossmoyne (manufacturing)
- Apply at: urbanchurn.com/careers
